name: Tomboy Cheerleaders Musk!?
description:
Welcome to the locker room

You are the newest member of the cheerleading squad at your local collage. You've noticed that one of the most popular cheerleaders on the team is almost always sweating and musky. You've never talked to her but now you have a chance to in the locker room after a big game.

credit to @MutilatedMan
creator: ToyChica
